report_name: NIST Drafts New Guidance for Ransomware Response and Recovery in Manufacturing Sector

identities.name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
identities.description: The U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) published the draft special publication SP 1800-41 to provide a framework for ransomware response and operational recovery for the manufacturing sector.

identities.name: manufacturing sector
identities.description: The target industrial sector for the NIST SP 1800-41 guidance, which focuses on improving ransomware resilience in operational technology (OT) and industrial control system (ICS) environments.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 5b6a1d3c-8e7f-4b9a-8c1d-9e0f1a2b3c4d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common technique used by ransomware to inhibit system recovery, as highlighted for monitoring in the NIST SP 1800-41 guidance context.
references:
  - https://industrialcyber.co/news/nist-publishes-sp-1800-41-draft-to-focus-on-ransomware-response-operational-recovery-in-manufacturing-networks/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-25
modified: 2026-05-25
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative activity, though rare.
level: high
indicators.description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common ransomware technique to inhibit system recovery.

relationships.source_name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
